title: The Incident Command System (ICS)
description: Architect a formal Incident Command System (ICS) framework for managing high-pressure Sev-1 outages. Define and implement clear roles and responsibilities (e.g., Commander, Scribe, Communications Lead) within an incident response team.
objectives: Architect a formal Incident Command System (ICS) framework for managing high-pressure Sev-1 outages.
Define and implement clear roles and responsibilities (e.g., Commander, Scribe, Communications Lead) within an incident response team.
